text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 01. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
